plugins.name: pm-tactical
plugins.description: Daily-workflow skills for PMs: model routing, self-QA, prompt optimization, MCP context audit, project memory.

plugins.name: pm-verifier
plugins.description: Spec-to-eval-harness engine: turns any feature spec into binary quality gates, a calibrated LLM-judge rubric, and a runnable pure-Python eval harness.

plugins.name: mcp-migration-auditor
plugins.description: 2026-07-28 spec readiness scanner: audits MCP configs against verified breaking changes (stateless transport, deprecated capabilities, Tasks migration, OAuth hardening) with per-server BREAKS/DEGRADED/SAFE verdicts and cited fixes.

plugins.name: loop-designer
plugins.description: Guarded autonomous loop generator: turns any recurring task into a five-part loop spec (Discover/Plan/Execute/Verify/Stop) with five non-negotiable guardrails and ready-to-paste Routine + cron runners.
